arabic: وَعَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ: نَهَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنِ التَّحْرِيشِ بَيْنَ الْبَهَائِمِ. رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ

english.text:
Ibn ‘Abbas told that God's messenger forbade inciting animals to fight with one another. 

Tirmidhi and Abu Dawud transmitted it.

chapter.english: Game and Animals Which May Be Slaughtered
